title: The most important chart moving from 2023 into 2024
section_path: The most important chart moving from 2023 into 2024
section_path_text: The most important chart moving from 2023 into 2024
summary:
Motor fuel import demand has slowed substantially over Q4, aligning well with an ailing pricing complex while dampening the repercussions from Red Sea risks. By David Wech
Εarlier this month, I was honoured to speak at the HC Insider Podcast on key features of the oil market in 2023 as well as the outlook for 2024. While a lot of relevant things happened last year with knock-on effects into 2024 and new issues are popping up, I would say the most important current feature and chart is the substantial slowdown in motor fuel import demand over the last couple of months.
